vocab.meaning: giao dịch mượt mà, không gặp trở ngại
vocab.example: The website’s interface was so intuitive that buying my latest pair of sneakers was a perfectly seamless transaction.

vocab.meaning: cửa hàng vật lý truyền thống (đối lập với online)
vocab.example: Although I enjoy online shopping, I still visit brick-and-mortar stores occasionally to get a feel for the materials.

vocab.meaning: chính sách đổi trả dễ dàng, không phiền hà
vocab.example: I only purchase footwear from platforms that offer a hassle-free return policy in case the fit isn't quite right.

vocab.meaning: lùng sục/tìm kiếm kỹ lưỡng trên mạng
vocab.example: I spent hours scouring the internet to find a limited edition pair of boots that was sold out everywhere else.

vocab.meaning: tránh xa (những rủi ro hoặc trang web không uy tín)
vocab.example: I tend to steer clear of social media ads for cheap shoes, as they often turn out to be poor-quality scams.

vocab.meaning: đánh giá từ người tiêu dùng
vocab.example: Relying on consumer reviews is crucial when buying shoes online to gauge whether they run true to size.

vocab.meaning: mức giá rẻ không đối thủ
vocab.example: I managed to snag these leather loafers at an unbeatable price during the year-end clearance sale.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi hành trình vận chuyển
vocab.example: The app provides real-time shipping tracking, so I knew exactly when my package was arriving at my doorstep.
I usually wait for a flash sale to upgrade my running shoes, as the discounts can be quite substantial.

vocab.meaning: quá trình thanh toán bảo mật
vocab.example: I always look for the padlock icon in the browser to ensure the site has a secure checkout before entering my card details.
